value.found_quote: Agent teams let you coordinate multiple Claude Code instances working together. One session acts as the team lead, coordinating work, assigning tasks, and synthesizing results. Teammates work independently, each in its own context window, and communicate directly with each other.
value.rationale: The page describes "Agent teams" which coordinate multiple independent Claude Code sessions working together, led by a team lead, with a shared task list and direct teammate-to-teammate messaging (mailbox). This matches the claim. The page states agent teams are experimental and disabled by default, indicating preview/beta status.
